tasks.label: Test VideoGlitcher Logic
args: mkdir -p test-bin && javac -d test-bin src/tom/videoGlitcher/VideoGlitcherLogic.java src/tom/videoGlitcher/FfmpegVideoExporter.java test/tom/videoGlitcher/VideoGlitcherLogicTest.java && java -cp test-bin tom.videoGlitcher.VideoGlitcherLogicTest

if not exist test-bin mkdir test-bin && javac -d test-bin src\tom\videoGlitcher\VideoGlitcherLogic.java src\tom\videoGlitcher\FfmpegVideoExporter.java test\tom\videoGlitcher\VideoGlitcherLogicTest.java && java -cp test-bin tom.videoGlitcher.VideoGlitcherLogicTest

tasks.label: Smoke Test VideoGlitcher Startup (macOS Apple Silicon)
Smoke Test VideoGlitcher Load (macOS Apple Silicon)
args: mkdir -p dist/smoke && ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i testsrc=size=640x360:rate=24 -t 3 -pix_fmt yuv420p dist/smoke/sample.mp4 >/dev/null 2>&1 && java -cp 'bin:lib/core.jar:lib/controlP5/library/*:lib/processing-opengl/library/*:lib/video/library/*' -Dgstreamer.library.path='${workspaceFolder}/lib/video/library/macos-aarch64' -Dgstreamer.plugin.path='${workspaceFolder}/lib/video/library/macos-aarch64/gstreamer-1.0' tom.videoGlitcher.VideoGlitcher --smoke-test --video=dist/smoke/sample.mp4 --smoke-frames=120

tasks.label: Smoke Test VideoGlitcher Export (macOS Apple Silicon)
args: mkdir -p dist/smoke && ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i testsrc=size=640x360:rate=24 -t 3 -pix_fmt yuv420p dist/smoke/sample.mp4 >/dev/null 2>&1 && java -cp 'bin:lib/core.jar:lib/controlP5/library/*:lib/processing-opengl/library/*:lib/video/library/*' -Dgstreamer.library.path='${workspaceFolder}/lib/video/library/macos-aarch64' -Dgstreamer.plugin.path='${workspaceFolder}/lib/video/library/macos-aarch64/gstreamer-1.0' tom.videoGlitcher.VideoGlitcher --smoke-test --video=dist/smoke/sample.mp4 --auto-export --smoke-frames=180 --export-frames=48

tasks.label: Package VideoGlitcher (macOS app)
tasks.command: rm -rf dist/package-input dist/VideoGlitcher.app && mkdir -p dist/package-input && jar --create --file dist/package-input/VideoGlitcher.jar -C bin . && cp lib/core.jar dist/package-input/ && cp lib/controlP5/library/*.jar dist/package-input/ && cp lib/processing-opengl/library/*.jar dist/package-input/ && cp lib/video/library/*.jar dist/package-input/ && cp -R lib/video/library/macos-aarch64 dist/package-input/video-macos-aarch64 && jpackage --type app-image --name VideoGlitcher --dest dist --input dist/package-input --main-jar VideoGlitcher.jar --main-class tom.videoGlitcher.VideoGlitcher --java-options "-Dgstreamer.library.path=\$APPDIR/Contents/app/video-macos-aarch64" --java-options "-Dgstreamer.plugin.path=\$APPDIR/Contents/app/video-macos-aarch64/gstreamer-1.0"

tasks.label: Package VideoGlitcher Release (macOS Apple Silicon)
tasks.command: rm -rf dist/release-macos dist/VideoGlitcher-macos-aarch64.zip && mkdir -p dist/release-macos/VideoGlitcher/lib dist/release-macos/VideoGlitcher/video && jar --create --file dist/release-macos/VideoGlitcher/VideoGlitcher.jar -C bin . && cp lib/core.jar dist/release-macos/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp lib/controlP5/library/*.jar dist/release-macos/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp lib/processing-opengl/library/*.jar dist/release-macos/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp lib/video/library/*.jar dist/release-macos/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp -R lib/video/library/macos-aarch64 dist/release-macos/VideoGlitcher/video/ && cp packaging/portable/run-macos.sh dist/release-macos/VideoGlitcher/ && chmod +x dist/release-macos/VideoGlitcher/run-macos.sh && cd dist/release-macos && zip -r ../VideoGlitcher-macos-aarch64.zip VideoGlitcher

tasks.label: Package VideoGlitcher Release (Linux x64)
tasks.command: rm -rf dist/release-linux dist/VideoGlitcher-linux-amd64.zip && mkdir -p dist/release-linux/VideoGlitcher/lib dist/release-linux/VideoGlitcher/video && jar --create --file dist/release-linux/VideoGlitcher/VideoGlitcher.jar -C bin . && cp lib/core.jar dist/release-linux/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp lib/controlP5/library/*.jar dist/release-linux/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp lib/processing-opengl/library/*.jar dist/release-linux/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp lib/video/library/*.jar dist/release-linux/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp -R lib/video/library/linux-amd64 dist/release-linux/VideoGlitcher/video/ && cp packaging/portable/run-linux.sh dist/release-linux/VideoGlitcher/ && chmod +x dist/release-linux/VideoGlitcher/run-linux.sh && cd dist/release-linux && zip -r ../VideoGlitcher-linux-amd64.zip VideoGlitcher

tasks.label: Package VideoGlitcher Release (Windows x64)
args: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist/release-windows, dist/VideoGlitcher-windows-amd64.zip -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force dist/release-windows/VideoGlitcher/lib | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force dist/release-windows/VideoGlitcher/video | Out-Null; jar --create --file dist/release-windows/VideoGlitcher/VideoGlitcher.jar -C bin .; Copy-Item lib/core.jar dist/release-windows/VideoGlitcher/lib/; Copy-Item lib/controlP5/library/*.jar dist/release-windows/VideoGlitcher/lib/; Copy-Item lib/processing-opengl/library/*.jar dist/release-windows/VideoGlitcher/lib/; Copy-Item lib/video/library/*.jar dist/release-windows/VideoGlitcher/lib/; Copy-Item -Recurse lib/video/library/windows-amd64 dist/release-windows/VideoGlitcher/video/; Copy-Item packaging/portable/run-windows.bat dist/release-windows/VideoGlitcher/; Compress-Archive -Path dist/release-windows/VideoGlitcher -DestinationPath dist/VideoGlitcher-windows-amd64.zip -Force
